report.technique: Multiphase liver MRI with extracellular gadolinium contrast.
report.comparison: MRI from 6 months prior — no observation.
report.findings: Cirrhotic liver morphology with mild splenomegaly. No discrete arterially hyperenhancing mass. No washout. No LI-RADS observation. Patent main portal vein and hepatic veins.
report.impression:
1. No new LI-RADS observation. LR-1.
2. Recommend continued LI-RADS surveillance MRI in 6 months.
